mapper.select: select m.id, m.`text`, m.`url`, m.parent_id, m.permission_id, p.pid, p.pname, p.presource from menu as m LEFT JOIN permission as p on m.permission_id = p.pid where m.parent_id is null
select m.id, m.`text`, m.`url`, m.parent_id, m.permission_id, p.pid, p.pname, p.presource from menu as m LEFT JOIN permission as p on m.permission_id = p.pid where m.parent_id = #{id}
mapper.update: update menu set parent_id = null where parent_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT m1.id, m1.`text`, m1.`url`, m2.id as m_id, m2.`text` as m_text, m2.`url` as m_url from menu as m1 LEFT JOIN menu as m2 ON m1.parent_id = m2.id order by m1.id desc
select parent_id from menu where id = #{id}
